name: Radiochromic Film Dosimetry Calibration
description: As a medical physicist QAing a radiation treatment plan, perform an optical density calibration on the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image to convert it into a radiation dose map. Calibrate the image intensity using a 'Straight Line' function with the following standards: Pixel Intensity 0 (Black) = 5.0 Gy, Pixel Intensity 255 (White) = 0.0 Gy, and Unit: 'Gy'. Generate measurement statistics for the calibrated image showing physical dose values. Save the calibrated image to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/calibrated_dose_map.tif' and the measurement results table to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/dose_report.csv'.
